languages.text: "Связь с одной из буровых платформ, добывающих прометий для Алтаря-Темплума, прервалась, поставки остановились. Похоже, магос хочет, чтобы вы узнали, что произошло". {n}Шепчет Вигдис.{/n}

"Communication with one of the drilling platforms that extract promethium for Altar-Templum has been disrupted, and the shipments have stopped. It seems the Magos wishes you to find out what has happened," {n}Vigdis supplies in a whisper.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Связь с одной из буровых платформ, добывающих прометий для Алтаря-Темплума, прервалась, поставки остановились. Похоже, магос хочет, чтобы вы узнали, что произошло". {n}Шепчет Вигдис.{/n}

"Communication with one of the drilling platforms that extract promethium for Altar-Templum has been disrupted, and the shipments have stopped. It seems the Magos wishes you to find out what has happened," {n}Vigdis supplies in a whisper.{/n}

languages.text: 「アルター・テンプルにプロメチウムを採掘するドリルプラットフォームの一つとの通信が遮断された。マゴスはあなたに何が起こったのかを確かめてほしいらしい」{n}ヴィグディスはささやく。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Communication with one of the drilling platforms that extract promethium for Altar-Templum has been disrupted. It seems the Magos wishes you to find out what has happened," {n}Vigdis supplies in a whisper.{/n}

traits.locale_text: アルター・テンプルにプロメチウムを採掘するドリルプラットフォームの一つとの通信が遮断された。マゴスはあなたに何が起こったのかを確かめてほしいらしい。{n}ヴィグディスはささやく。{/n}

languages.text: «Se ha interrumpido la comunicación con una de las plataformas perforadoras que extraen prometio para Altar-Templum, por lo que los cargamentos se han detenido y el magos quiere que investigue lo ocurrido». {n}Vigdis aclara el mensaje entre susurros.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Communication with one of the drilling platforms that extract promethium for Altar-Templum has been disrupted, and the shipments have stopped. It seems the Magos wishes you to find out what has happened," {n}Vigdis supplies in a whisper.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Se ha interrumpido la comunicación con una de las plataformas perforadoras que extraen prometio para Altar-Templum, por lo que los cargamentos se han detenido y el magos quiere que investigue lo ocurrido». {n}Vigdis aclara el mensaje entre susurros.{/n}

languages.text: "Die Kommunikation mit einer der Bohrplattformen, die Promethium für Altar-Templum fördern, wurde unterbrochen, alle Lieferungen wurden eingestellt. Offenbar wünscht der Magos, dass Ihr herausfindet, was passiert ist", {n}flüstert dir Vigdis zu.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Communication with one of the drilling platforms that extract promethium for Altar-Templum has been disrupted, and the shipments have stopped. It seems the Magos wishes you to find out what has happened," {n}Vigdis supplies in a whisper.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Die Kommunikation mit einer der Bohrplattformen, die Promethium für Altar-Templum fördern, wurde unterbrochen, alle Lieferungen wurden eingestellt. Offenbar wünscht der Magos, dass Ihr herausfindet, was passiert ist", {n}flüstert dir Vigdis zu.{/n}

languages.text: « Les communications avec l'une des plateformes de forage de prométhium au bénéfice d'Altar-Templum ont été interrompues, et les livraisons se sont interrompues. Il semblerait que le magos souhaite que vous enquêtiez sur la raison de ce silence, » {n}vous souffle Vigdis.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Communication with one of the drilling platforms that extract promethium for Altar-Templum has been disrupted, and the shipments have stopped. It seems the Magos wishes you to find out what has happened," {n}Vigdis supplies in a whisper.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Les communications avec l'une des plateformes de forage de prométhium au bénéfice d'Altar-Templum ont été interrompues, et les livraisons se sont interrompues. Il semblerait que le magos souhaite que vous enquêtiez sur la raison de ce silence, » {n}vous souffle Vigdis.{/n}

languages.text: “祭坛与某个钷素开采平台的通讯已中断，运输也已停止。看来，贤者是希望您去查明发生了什么。”{n}维格迪斯低声补充道。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Communication with one of the drilling platforms that extract promethium for Altar-Templum has been disrupted, and the shipments have stopped. It seems the Magos wishes you to find out what has happened," {n}Vigdis supplies in a whisper.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “祭坛与某个钷素开采平台的通讯已中断，运输也已停止。看来，贤者是希望您去查明发生了什么。”{n}维格迪斯低声补充道。{/n}

languages.text: "Altar-Templum'a prometyum çıkaran sondaj platformlarından biriyle iletişim kesilmiş, sevkiyatlar durmuş. Görünüşe göre Magos, ne olduğunu öğrenmenizi istiyor." {n}Vigdis fısıldayarak ekliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Communication with one of the drilling platforms that extract promethium for Altar-Templum has been disrupted, and the shipments have stopped. It seems the Magos wishes you to find out what has happened," {n}Vigdis supplies in a whisper.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Altar-Templum'a prometyum çıkaran sondaj platformlarından biriyle iletişim kesilmiş, sevkiyatlar durmuş. Görünüşe göre Magos, ne olduğunu öğrenmenizi istiyor." {n}Vigdis fısıldayarak ekliyor.{/n}
